arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic: Three changes in our expected team v Cambridge!
arts.sum: Paul Kendrick runs the rule over the Wigan Athletic squad and predicts the 11 men who interim boss Glenn Whelan will select to start against Cambridge United at the Brick Community Stadium on Saturday.

arts.ttl: 'Our fingerprints on Shaun Maloney sacking', admits Wigan Athletic skipper
arts.sum: Jason Kerr could not hide his disappointment after admitting Wigan Athletic's players have 'our fingerprints' on Shaun Maloney's departure as manager.

arts.ttl: Glenn Whelan on ignoring Wigan Athletic betting market and taking it day by day - 'Save your money!'
arts.sum: Glenn Whelan insists he's not giving a moment's thought to the betting market for Wigan Athletic's new manager - which has seen him fly up to second favouritism.
